summary: Fighting game move/attack state machine: animation sequence scheduler via cooperative task swapping, combo chains, sound triggers at specific animation frames, move initialization and cleanup.

functions.move_exec_current: Main move execution entry. Checks AI/interrupt conditions, then calls player_exec_move for current attack entry
functions.move_delay_cb: Task callback: waits for animation startup delay frames, then calls move_exec_current
functions.move_osc_up: Task callback: animation oscillation phase 1 — counts up to entry duration
functions.move_osc_down: Task callback: animation oscillation phase 2 — counts down from entry duration
functions.move_count_up: Task callback: simple count-up until entry duration, then TASK_END
functions.move_apply_vel: Task callback: waits for startup frames, then applies Z-velocity from entry data
functions.move_to_next: Task callback: counts frames then transitions to next move via move_exec_current
functions.move_camera_trig: Task callback: triggers cinematic camera at specified frame of attack entry
functions.move_state_change: Transition to new move/attack state. Sets up new x_388306ba entry, model visibility, camera triggers
functions.move_anim_change: Change animation within same move (combo chain). Manages frame counters, model visibility, sync
functions.move_exec_init: Initialize move execution: wait startup frames, then load animation, apply velocity, set flags
functions.move_init_cb: Move init callback: sets initial move state, pushes to task stack
functions.move_retry_cb: Move retry/continuation: push task stack, try player_exec_state, handle failure or return
functions.move_sfx_trig: Frame-triggered sound effects: checks 4 frame match points and plays SFX via audio_sfx_play

structs_used: x_388306ba (0x38) — move/attack entry: frame timings, flags, anim ID, camera state, visibility mask, SFX trigger index
x_c8184673 (0x8) — SFX frame trigger: 4 pairs of {frame, soundId}
subsystems: Move task scheduler via function-pointer swapping
